ab: Jiyax sngayan nii ga, yaku ni qbsuran qrijil musa nami Taytung qmita swayi snaw tama.
ch: 這個假日，我和姊姊去台東拜訪叔叔。
en: This holiday, my sister and I went to Taitung to visit my uncle.

ab: Kndadax nami Taypey teapa rulu qrngul musa Taytung.
ch: 我們從台北搭火車去臺東。
en: We took the train from Taipei to Taitung.

ab: Dhuq nami Taytung do pgriq rulu miyah smtrung mnan ka swayi snaw tama.
ch: 到了台東，叔叔開車來接我們。
en: When we arrived in Taitung, my uncle drove to the station to pick us up.

ab: Sapah swayi snaw tama sdalih tgaan rulu, mgriq rulu o ini biyaw dhuq.
ch: 車站離叔叔家很近，開車一下子就到了。
en: The station is not far from my uncle's house, and it's just a short drive away.

ab: Kiyig sapah swayi snaw tama o niqan llabang bi qnalang tbugan, seupu nami teapa ddeynsya musa tbugan.
ch: 叔叔家附近有個很大的牧場，我們一起騎腳踏車到牧場。
en: There is a big ranch near my uncle's house, and we rode bicycles to the ranch together.

ab: Mniq nami ruwan qnalang tbugan hini, madas mnan musa tmabug miric ni teapa dmai ka swayi snaw tama.
ch: 在牧場，叔叔帶我們餵羊和騎馬。
en: In the ranch, my uncle took us to feed the sheep and ride horses.

ab: Keeman do seupu nami musa mkan nhapuy sapah uqan.
ch: 晚上，我們一起去餐廳吃飯。
en: In the evening, we went to the city to have dinner together.

ab: Ida egu bi rulu ka s-cyu, kiya ni teapa nami utubay musa hiya.
ch: 市區車子很多，所以我們騎摩托車去那裡。
en: There are a lot of cars in the city, so we go there by motorcycle.

ab: Mmiyah nami sapah siida, wada guyun da utubay, kiya ni teapa nami basu meiyah sapah da.
ch: 我們要的時返家時，摩托車被偷了，我們只好搭公車回家。
en: When we were about to leave, we found that the motorcycle had been stolen, so we had to leave by bus.

ab: Sayang do gaga nami dhuq Taypey da, ya wada slayun ka utubay swayi snaw tama dhug?
ch: 現在我們回到台北了，不知道叔叔的摩托車找到了沒有。
en: Now that we are back in Taipei, I don't know if my uncle's motorcycle has been found.
